problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: If Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient is applied to than, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.
